prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace how Firefox's Servo-based CSS style system resolves and applies styles to DOM elements. Find all C++ source files in `mozilla-firefox/firefox` under `layout/style/` that form the core style resolution pipeline: 1. The header and source files for `ServoStyleSet` — the main entry point for style resolution. 2. The header for `ServoBindings` — the Gecko-to-Servo FFI declarations. 3. The header for `RestyleManager` — the component that schedules and manages style recalculation. 4. The header for `ServoUtils` — utility functions for Servo traversal state. 5. The `moz.build` file for `layout/style/` that lists all the style system source files. Report the repo, file path, and key class or FFI function name for each file.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the mozilla-firefox fixture.
